name: Full DroneFleet Campaign
description: A comprehensive multi-stage attack on the entire drone fleet, representing ALL attack techniques.

techniques.comment: Occurrences: 500+ | Mapped rule: Commonly Used Port (Mass C2 Beaconing)
Occurrences: 34 | Mapped rule: Manipulation of Control (GPS Spoofing, Collision, Emergency Land)
Occurrences: 42 | Mapped rule: Manipulation of View (IMU Drift & Telemetry Fuzzing)
Occurrences: 10 | Mapped rule: Damage to Property (Aggressive Battery Drain)
Occurrences: 8 | Mapped rule: Device Restart/Shutdown (Forced reboot via Firmware Hook)
Occurrences: 3 | Mapped rule: Program Download (Payload updates)
Occurrences: 12 | Mapped rule: Remote System Discovery (Scanning mesh network)
Occurrences: 15 | Mapped rule: Brute Force I/O (Sensor Spam/LiDAR)
Occurrences: 2 | Mapped rule: Spoof Reporting Message
